root_text.an8.47:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati pubbārāme migāramātupāsāde.
root_text.an8.47:1.3: ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho visākhaṁ migāramātaraṁ bhagavā etadavoca:
root_text.an8.47:2.1: “Aṭṭhahi kho, visākhe, dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā manāpakāyikānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an8.47:2.3: Idha, visākhe, mātugāmo yassa mātāpitaro bhattuno denti atthakāmā hitesino anukampakā anukampaṁ upādāya tassa hoti pubbuṭṭhāyinī pacchānipātinī kiṅkārapaṭissāvinī manāpacārinī piyavādinī …pe….
root_text.an8.47:3.2: Vigatamalamaccherena cetasā agāraṁ ajjhāvasati muttacāgā payatapāṇinī vossaggaratā yācayogā dānasaṁvibhāgaratā.
root_text.an8.47:3.3: Imehi kho, visākhe, aṭṭhahi dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā manāpakāyikānaṁ devānaṁ sahabyataṁ upapajjatīti.

translation_text.an8.47:0.3: With Visākhā on the Agreeable Gods
translation_text.an8.47:1.1: At one time the Buddha was staying near Sāvatthī in the stilt longhouse of Migāra’s mother in the Eastern Monastery.
translation_text.an8.47:1.2: Then Visākhā, Migāra’s mother, went up to the Buddha, bowed, and sat down to one side.
translation_text.an8.47:2.1: “Visākhā, when they have eight qualities ladies—when their body breaks up, after death—are reborn in company with the Gods of the Agreeable Host.
translation_text.an8.47:2.3: Take the case of a lady whose mother and father give her to a husband wanting what’s best for her, out of kindness and sympathy. She would get up before him and go to bed after him, and be obliging, behaving nicely and speaking politely. …
translation_text.an8.47:3.2: She lives at home rid of the stain of stinginess, freely generous, open-handed, loving to let go, committed to charity, loving to give and to share.
translation_text.an8.47:3.3: When they possess these eight qualities ladies—when their body breaks up, after death—are reborn in company with the Gods of the Agreeable Host.
translation_text.an8.47:4.1: She’d never look down on her husband,
translation_text.an8.47:4.2: who’s always eager to work hard,
translation_text.an8.47:5.1: And a good woman never scolds her husband
translation_text.an8.47:6.1: She gets up early, works tirelessly,
translation_text.an8.47:7.1: A lady who fulfills these duties
